description: Jennifer supports the strategic direction of the Nuclear Restoration Services (NRS) delivery business units. She is well-acquainted with NRS, having served as a non-executive director on the NRS Board and beginning her career at Berkeley. Jennifer joined Magnox Electric in the 1990s as Berkeley’s graduate structural and civil engineer, eventually working at each of the company’s nuclear power stations. Over the past 21 years at Sellafield, she has held various roles, including civil engineer, head of PCM (plutonium contaminated materials) Delivery Operations, head of evaporator D pre-operations, head of the site management project office, and most recently, chief engineer.

details.body:
Jennifer supports the strategic direction of the Nuclear Restoration Services (NRS) delivery business units. She is well-acquainted with NRS, having served as a non-executive director on the NRS Board and beginning her career at Berkeley. Jennifer joined Magnox Electric in the 1990s as Berkeley’s graduate structural and civil engineer, eventually working at each of the company’s nuclear power stations.

Over the past 21 years at Sellafield, she has held various roles, including civil engineer, head of PCM (plutonium contaminated materials) Delivery Operations, head of evaporator D pre-operations, head of the site management project office, and most recently, chief engineer.

Jennifer joined Magnox Electric in the 1990s as Berkeley’s graduate structural and civil engineer, eventually working at each of the company’s nuclear power stations.

Over the past 21 years at Sellafield, she has held various roles, including civil engineer, head of PCM (plutonium contaminated materials) Delivery Operations, head of evaporator D pre-operations, head of the site management project office, and most recently, chief engineer.

title: Jenifer Carruthers
